Class MediaTableModel

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.table.AbstractTableModel
mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, TableModel
public class MediaTableModel extends AbstractTableModel
Table model that manages a collection of MediaFile objects.

This model provides the data required by a JTable to display downloaded media files. Each row represents a MediaFile and each column corresponds to a specific attribute such as file name, MIME type, size and download date.

The model notifies the table automatically when data changes using the appropriate fireTable... methods.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Romina
See Also:

      Returns the value stored at a specific cell.

      value to be rendered in the table cell, or null if invalid

      public MediaFile getMediaFileAt(int rowIndex)
      Returns the MediaFile stored at the specified row.

      the corresponding MediaFile, or null if the index is invalid

      public void clearAll()
      Removes all media files from the model.

    • getMediaFiles

      public List<MediaFile> getMediaFiles()
      Returns the internal list of media files.

      list containing all stored media files

    • setMediaFiles

      public void setMediaFiles(List<MediaFile> files)

    • indexOf

      public int indexOf(MediaFile mf)
      Returns the index of the specified media file.
      Parameters:
      mf - media file to search
      Returns:
      index of the media file, or -1 if not found
